UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user of the ChatPMT application, storing their personal details, preferences, and current usage allowances. This entity links to an external authentication system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

email.description: The user's email address, typically used for login and communication. This should be unique across all user profiles.

displayName.description: The user's chosen display name or alias within the application.

preferredLanguage.description: The user's preferred language for the application interface and generated prompt output (e.g., 'Hindi', 'Hinglish', 'English').

remainingDailyFreePrompts.description: The number of free prompts a user has remaining for the current day, resetting daily based on the freemium model.

lastFreePromptResetDate.description: The timestamp when the user's daily free prompt count was last reset.

creditsBalance.description: The total number of credits currently available to the user for generating prompts, typically acquired via credit pack purchases.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

Prompt.title: Prompt
Prompt.description: Stores the details of a user's generated AI prompt, including the original input idea, the sophisticated AI-generated output, and all the settings applied during its creation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Prompt entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who generated this prompt. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Prompt)

inputIdea.description: The user's original, raw idea or input text provided to the prompt converter, potentially in Hindi, Hinglish, or English.

detectedInputLanguage.description: The language automatically detected from the user's input idea (e.g., 'Hindi', 'Hinglish', 'English').

generatedPromptText.description: The high-quality, structured, and conversion-focused AI prompt generated by the Prompt Intelligence Engine.

promptType.description: The category or type of the generated prompt, selected by the user (e.g., 'Content Writing', 'YouTube Script', 'Ad Copy', 'Image AI Prompt', 'Coding/App Idea').

qualityLevel.description: The selected quality level for the prompt generation, influencing its complexity and detail (e.g., 'Basic', 'Advanced', 'Expert').

targetPlatform.description: The specific AI platform for which the prompt was optimized (e.g., 'ChatGPT', 'Midjourney', 'Gemini', 'Claude', 'Veo/Sora').

creativitySetting.description: The creativity level applied during prompt generation, ranging from 'Low' to 'High'.

toneSetting.description: The desired tone for the AI output, such as 'Professional' or 'Casual'.

detailSetting.description: The level of detail desired in the AI output, such as 'Short' or 'Detailed'.

industryPreset.description: The industry preset used to add context and specific nuances to the prompt (e.g., 'Gym', 'Real Estate', 'E-commerce', 'YouTube', 'Instagram Reels').

outputLanguage.description: The language of the final generated prompt (e.g., 'Hindi', 'Hinglish', 'English').

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the prompt was generated and saved to history.

isArchived.description: A flag indicating if the user has archived this prompt, typically for hiding older entries from the primary view.

SubscriptionPlan.title: SubscriptionPlan
SubscriptionPlan.description: Defines the different subscription tiers, credit packs, and business plans available for purchase within the ChatPMT app, outlining their features and pricing.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SubscriptionPlan entity.

name.description: The human-readable name of the subscription plan or credit pack (e.g., 'Pro Monthly', 'Starter Credit Pack', 'Business Tier 1').

description.description: A detailed description of what the plan or pack offers, including its benefits and target audience.

type.description: The classification of the offering (e.g., 'Subscription' for recurring plans, 'CreditPack' for one-time credit purchases, 'Business' for enterprise plans).

price.description: The monetary cost of the plan or credit pack.

durationInDays.description: The intended duration of the subscription in days for recurring plans (e.g., 30 for monthly). This property is null for credit packs or one-time purchases.

promptAllowance.description: The number of prompts or credits provided by this plan. Use -1 to denote unlimited prompts for a subscription plan.

features.description: A list of additional premium features included with this plan (e.g., 'Advanced Optimization', 'Prompt History', 'Platform-Based Optimization').

isActive.description: A flag indicating whether this subscription plan is currently available for users to purchase.

sortOrder.description: An integer representing the preferred display order of the plan in a list, for UI presentation.

UserSubscription.title: UserSubscription
UserSubscription.description: Tracks a specific user's active or past subscriptions, including details for recurring plans and one-time credit pack purchases, linking to the SubscriptionPlan definition.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserSubscription entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile associated with this subscription record. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N UserSubscription)

planId.description: Reference to the SubscriptionPlan that this user has subscribed to or purchased. (Relationship: SubscriptionPlan 1:N UserSubscription)

status.description: The current status of the user's subscription (e.g., 'active', 'cancelled', 'expired', 'pending', 'free_trial').

startDate.description: The timestamp when this particular user subscription officially started.

endDate.description: The timestamp when this subscription is scheduled to end or did end (for timed subscriptions) or when credits from a pack are considered 'used up'.

paymentProviderSubscriptionId.description: The unique identifier for this subscription record within the external payment gateway (e.g., Stripe, Razorpay), primarily for recurring subscription plans.

transactionId.description: The unique identifier for the one-time payment transaction in the external payment gateway, applicable for credit packs or singular purchases.

purchasedCredits.description: The number of credits purchased in this specific transaction, if the associated plan type is 'CreditPack'.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when this user subscription record was created in the system.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when this user subscription record was last updated.

definition.description: Stores individual user profiles. Access is restricted to the owner matching `request.auth.uid`. This path supports user login and signup functionality by providing a dedicated, securely accessible document for each user. Includes `id` matching the Firestore document ID (which is the user's UID), `email`, `displayName`, `preferredLanguage`, and fields for managing `remainingDailyFreePrompts` and `creditsBalance`.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, matching `request.auth.uid`.

definition.description: Stores AI-generated prompts for a specific user. This subcollection leverages denormalized `userId` in the path for authorization independence, allowing atomic operations and simple, ownership-based security rules (`request.auth.uid == userId`). Each document contains the original `inputIdea`, `generatedPromptText`, `promptType`, `qualityLevel`, and other settings.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this prompt, matching `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: promptId
params.description: The unique identifier for the generated prompt.

definition.description: Stores definitions of all available subscription plans and credit packs. This collection is publicly readable for all users to browse available offerings, and is managed by administrators. It includes `name`, `type`, `price`, `promptAllowance`, and `features`.

params.name: planId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific subscription plan or credit pack.

definition.description: Tracks a specific user's active or past subscriptions and credit pack purchases. This subcollection denormalizes `userId` into the path for authorization independence, ensuring that users can only manage their own subscriptions (`request.auth.uid == userId`). It links to a `SubscriptionPlan` via `planId` and tracks `status`, `startDate`, `endDate`, and `purchasedCredits`.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this subscription record, matching `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: userSubscriptionId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific user's subscription record.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure for ChatPMT prioritizes secure, scalable, and debuggable access by adhering to Authorization Independence and Structural Segregation principles.
